hero.title: Access to healthcare is a <red>right</red>.
hero.subtitle: ITPC-MENA advocates for equitable access to medicines and healthcare for everyone, across 14 countries in the Middle East and North Africa.

about.title: A regional coalition for the right to health
about.body: ITPC-MENA works for equitable access to care, medicines and other health products. With a global perspective and full transparency, we work towards global solutions to local challenges across the MENA region.

programmes.title: Initiatives shaping the future of health
programmes.subtitle: Three complementary programmes, deployed across 14 MENA countries.

resources.title: Publications, tools and guides to act
resources.subtitle: Explore our publications for an in-depth understanding of issues related to access to care and medicines.

footer.description: International Treatment Preparedness Coalition — Middle East and North Africa Region. For equitable access to care and medicines.
